description_long: This object consists of a group of five outdoor air conditioning condenser units, each with a rectangular box-like form and visible front-facing grilles. The units vary in size, with the largest on the left and the smallest on the right, and all are finished in a light gray or off-white color typical of HVAC equipment. The front faces display different grille patterns, including mesh and slatted designs, with some units featuring visible fans behind the grilles. The sides and backs are mostly solid panels, with some units having small access doors or panels for maintenance. The units are elevated on short legs or brackets, allowing airflow beneath them, and some have small wheels for mobility. These air conditioners are commonly found in urban environments, installed outside buildings to provide cooling for interior spaces.
description: A group of five rectangular outdoor air conditioning condenser units in varying sizes, featuring front-facing grilles and a light gray finish. The units are elevated on legs or brackets and display different grille patterns and fan placements.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the units, with minimal visible detail except for the stacked arrangement.
description_view_1: The front view displays all five units side by side, highlighting their grille patterns, fan placements, and size differences.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, shows the narrow profiles of the units with little surface detail visible.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the solid backs of the units, with some support legs and minimal paneling detail.
attribute_brand_logo: Small blue and white rectangular logos are visible on the upper right corners of some front panels.
attribute_grille_pattern: The grilles feature a mix of mesh and horizontal slat patterns, with some circular fan guards and evenly spaced bars.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Exhaust vents are located on the front faces, integrated with the grille patterns, and are primarily rectangular with mesh or slatted designs.
